blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 295 ft. Looking ahead, 35 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
